summary: The behavioural-equivalence fixture does not preserve or bind the synthetic probe input bytes. Under the mandated Darwin/arm64 frozen environment, the reconstructed probe input differs from the input implicitly represented by the frozen raw-output digest, so the eight output mismatches cannot distinguish fixture drift from operator drift.
required_resolution: Recover the exact probe input bytes or the original environment/platform that reproduces SHA 9a3049d7...
Bind the recovered probe input SHA and complete environment fingerprint to the behavioural-equivalence evidence
Rerun all eight output pins before starting L3-L9 downstream training
prohibited_resolution: Do not replace the expected output hashes with values observed in the new environment
Do not treat pool membership equality as behavioural equivalence
Do not start Task G or consume any fresh holdout while this erratum is open
